Justification for Mapping: Geographic area code identifies subject place
Transformation Notes:
[Work]-->rdaw:P10316-->[PlaceIRI]
[placeIRI] rdap:P70020 has identifier of place [placeNomen]
[placeNomen] rdan:P80068 has nomen string [values of $b]
[placeNomen] rdan:P80069 has scheme of nomen [value of $2]

Follow pattern for other identifiers as nomens with sources in schemes with $2.
Notes (Uncategorized): value of $2 is not looked up, it does not appear that LC has made geographic area source codes (https://www.loc.gov/standards/sourcelist/geographic-area.html)  available as linked data - CP 2024-0828

Justification for Mapping: Geographic area code identifies subject place
Transformation Notes: Mint a place and mint a nomen. Nomen string = code. Has scheme of nomen: "http://purl.org/dc/terms/ISO3166 " -- CY, CP, PS 2024-07-11

MARCSubfieldLabel: Authority record control number or standard number (R)
Transformation Notes: if the $0 begins with 'http://id.loc.gov/authorities/names/ ', the geographic area code can be retrieved from this name authority file, tidied up (removing trailing spaces and hyphens), and combined with 'http://id.loc.gov/vocabulary/geographicAreas/ ' to get the geographic area code IRI

Transformation Notes: Use the LC Geographic Areas IRI: the geographic area code can be retrieved from this name authority file, which can be found using the Agent IRI, tidied up (removing trailing spaces and hyphens), and combined with 'http://id.loc.gov/vocabulary/geographicAreas/' to get the geographic area code IRI
